# Etch

> A browser extension that adds bookmarks and a saved panel to AI chat interfaces (ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, Gemini, and more), so useful moments stop disappearing into the scrollback.

Etch is a lightweight browser extension for Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc, and Firefox. It lets you bookmark any paragraph, heading, list, or quote inside an AI conversation and jump back to it instantly. Bookmarks are stored locally in the browser — no account or sync required.

## Features

- Bookmark any semantic block inside an AI conversation with a single click
- Collections panel: review all saved bookmarks for the current conversation
- Bookmarks are scoped per conversation and stored locally
- Supports 14+ AI chat surfaces including ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, and Gemini

## Privacy

See the full privacy policy at https://k-leumas.github.io/etch-extension/privacy-policy/

## Download

- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/etch/enncblmoicoleaocogkpkabofpdlojho) — Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc
- [Firefox Add-ons](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/etch/) — Firefox
